EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface ITerrain

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseExtensions
Assembly
ESRI.Server.GeoDatabaseExtensions.dll

Provides access to members used to acquire information about a Terrain and to retrieve DynamicSurface objects from which raster and TIN surfaces are made.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("F657C7ED-FE73-493E-8CF7-845E20CB7D9B")]
public interface ITerrain

Properties

DataSource[int]

Returns the data source specified by the index.

ITerrainDataSource DataSource[int Index] { get; }

Parameters

Index int

Property Value

ITerrainDataSource

Examples

Sample Snippet

DataSourceCount

The number of data sources participating in the terrain.

int DataSourceCount { get; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

Extent

The approximate xyz extent of the terrain.

IEnvelope Extent { get; }

Property Value

IEnvelope

Examples

Sample Snippet

FeatureDataset

The feature dataset which contains the terrain.

IFeatureDataset FeatureDataset { get; }

Property Value

IFeatureDataset

Examples

Sample Snippet

ID

The database identifier of the terrain.

int ID { get; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsDirty

Indicates whether or not a partial rebuild is needed.

bool IsDirty { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsValid

Indicates whether or not a full build is required.

bool IsValid { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

MaxOverviewTerrainPoints

The maximum number of points in the most generalized representation of a Terrain.

int MaxOverviewTerrainPoints { get; }

Property Value

int

MaxPointsPerShape

The maximum number of vertices per multipoint.

int MaxPointsPerShape { get; }

Property Value

int

Name

The name of the terrain.

string Name { get; }

string

Returns the pyramid level specified by the index.

int

The pyramid type of this Terrain.

esriTerrainPyramidType PyramidType { get; }

Size

The total number of points in the Terrain.

double Size { get; }

SpatialReference

The spatial reference of the terrain.

ISpatialReference SpatialReference { get; }

ISpatialReference

Sample Snippet

TileSize

The horizontal distance used to spatially index and partition terrain data.

double TileSize { get; }

double

Methods

CreateDynamicSurface()

Returns an implicit surface from which TINs and rasters are derived.

IDynamicSurface CreateDynamicSurface()

Returns

IDynamicSurface

QueryTileInfo(out int, out int, out int, out int, out double, out double, out double, out int, out int)

Returns horizontal partitioning information about the terrain data.
